title: Cobblemon Auto-Battle
description: Cobblemon Auto Battle turns one of your party Cobblemon into a smart training partner that can fight wild Cobblemon on its own while you keep exploring, building, farming, or traveling.
body:
**Cobblemon Auto-Battle** is a Cobblemon addon that lets your sent-out Cobblemon automatically find wild targets, start real Cobblemon battles, choose moves intelligently, manage PP, and keep training while you explore, build, gather, or travel.

This mod is built as a Cobblemon addon and uses Cobblemon's own battle system rather than replacing it.

![Showcase](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/bq2AP.gif)

## What It Does

- Toggle auto-battle directly from the Cobblemon Summary screen
- Configure rules per Cobblemon 
- Only one auto-battle leader at a time, to avoid conflicts
- Auto-battle only works while that Cobblemon is actually out of its ball
- Real Cobblemon battles, with the battle screen kept minimized during auto-battle
- Intelligent move choice with PP awareness
- Party rotation support after fainting
- Catch-focused modes for shinies and special Pokemon
- Live range preview in settings
- Manual takeover whenever you want it

## Mod Showcase
![Toggle](https://files.catbox.moe/lmc0q4.jpg)
![settings 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d5c79b9ea8886b073e6af5947c9805ce81fc1e9.png)# Cobblemon Auto-Battle
![Range](https://files.catbox.moe/vt3prg.jpg)
![setting2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/068027dd286d6b8dd9cc156f7e6d019d10da84d8.png)
![settings 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08d406e48879bdf7de225fce9871c72a782913b3.png)
![settings 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cb9f19b0018416a60b88d19f85a303e2235f6a1.png)
![settings 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a96ca80fa82c408002a2bf43e8eea831d06cebd_0.webp)

## Smart Battle Logic

Auto Battle is not just an auto-attack toggle. It actively makes battle decisions using Cobblemon data:

- Prefers stronger and more effective moves
- Can favor safer move usage or faster XP based on Training Mode (set in configs)
- Avoids using moves with 0 PP
- Can preserve stronger moves for harder targets
- Stops if the active Cobblemon has no damaging moves with PP left


## Catch Rare Cobblemon

Catch Mode can be used to watch for valuable targets while training:

- `Off`: normal auto-battle behavior
- `Shiny Only`: Only starts battles with shinies
- `Special Only`: reacts to special targets such as legendary, mythical, or Ultra Beast encounters

![Catch Mode](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/bq2AX.gif)

Catch behavior has two styles:

- Hunt only matching targets
- Battle everything, but pause when a matching target appears with `Pause On Match`

When a tracked shiny or special target is found, the mod can:

- Start the battle for you
- Turn auto-battle off
- Hand control back to you
- Alert you that the special target was found


## Battle Settings

Each auto-battling Cobblemon has its own settings:

- `Range` (area of engagement)
- `Lvl Cap Above`
- `Lvl Cap Below`
- `Own Level Cap`
- `Stop At HP %`
- `Training Mode`
- `Catch Mode`
- `Pause On Match`
- `Weakness Only`
- `Preserve Strong Moves`
- `Stop On Evolution`
- `Enemy Rarity`
- `Evolution Stage`
- `Exclude Shinies`
- `Rotation` party slots
- `Presets`


## Training Modes

- `Balanced`: general-purpose auto-battle behavior
- `Fast XP`: prioritizes faster training and quicker engagement
- `Safest`: favors more cautious target and move choices


## Important Stop Conditions

Auto-battle can be configured to stop automatically when:

- Your Cobblemon reaches its own level cap
- HP falls below the configured threshold
- It becomes ready to evolve
- It runs out of usable damaging moves
- A catch-worthy shiny or special target is found

`Stop At HP %` can also be disabled by setting it to `0%`.


## Low HP Handling

When the active Cobblemon hits the HP threshold during battle, the mod will prompt you with a healing decision:

- `Yes`: returns control so you can use a healing item
- `No`: keeps auto-battle going for that battle until your Cobblemon faints

If the Cobblemon faints, the healing prompt does not appear. Faint handling uses the replacement flow instead. (Selected rotation party)


## Replacement and Rotation

When an auto-battling Cobblemon faints:

- You can continue manually
- You can continue auto-battling with the next selected Cobblemon
- You can configure party-slot rotation rules so only chosen slots are allowed to take over

Rotation is configured in the `Rotation` tab:

- Turn individual party slots on or off
- Use `Choose All`
- Use `Clear All`

If no valid rotation target exists, the normal replacement selection flow is used.


## Summary Screen Integration

The Summary screen includes an expandable Auto-Battle menu where you can:

- Turn auto-battle on or off
- Open the full settings screen

The UI is designed to stay out of the way and work as an extension of Cobblemon rather than replacing it.


## Range Preview

The `Range` setting includes a live preview mode:

- Changing the range opens a temporary dome preview
- The preview centers around the player
- You can look around freely to understand the covered area
- The preview stays active while you keep adjusting the value
- It returns to the settings screen automatically after a short delay


## Manual Control During Auto-Battle

If you want to take control while a Cobblemon is auto-battling, the mod supports manual intervention through the same keybind used to send out your Cobblemon:

- Choose to continue auto-battle
- Or stop auto-battle and return to manual battle control

This makes it easy to step in for catches, emergencies, or specific decisions without disabling the feature permanently.


## Why Use It

Cobblemon Auto Battle is made for players who want training to feel smoother and less repetitive without giving up the real Cobblemon battle system.

It is especially useful for:

- Leveling new team members
- EV and battle grinding
- Exploring while your Cobblemon handles encounters
- Watching for shinies or special targets without fighting every battle manually
- Creating party rotation training setups


## Designed for Cobblemon

- Uses Cobblemon battles
- Uses Cobblemon move and PP systems
- Uses Cobblemon Pokemon data
- Respects multiplayer-safe addon structure
- Does not replace Cobblemon's core battle mechanics


| Requirement | Version |
| --- | --- |
| Minecraft | `1.21.1` |
| Mod Loader | `Fabric` |
| Fabric Loader | `0.17.2+` |
| Fabric API | `0.116.6+1.21.1` |
| Cobblemon | `1.7.3+1.21.1` |
